description: Configure the 'Mobile Banking App' project to use the 'Documents' module and create a global 'Specifications' document category in System Administration (Enumerations). Within the 'Mobile Banking App' project, add a document titled 'Mobile App Specification v1' assigned to the 'Specifications' category, including the attachment from /home/ga/mobile_spec_v1.txt. You are logged in as admin (password: Admin1234!).
